wordplay_note: Kirsten's schizophrenic son who may channel the dead bishop
card_description: Bill Lundborg is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*. Young man who appears to transmigrate with Timothy Archer's consciousness. Name note: Kirsten's schizophrenic son who may channel the dead bishop. The vessel of transmigration — PKD's exploration of metempsychosis. First appears in *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*.

reference.brief: Young man who appears to transmigrate with Timothy Archer's consciousness
reference.significance: The vessel of transmigration — PKD's exploration of metempsychosis
